name: io.github.lildaddyo/braintube-mcp
title: BrainTube
description: Personal knowledge MCP — semantically search everything you save (YouTube, articles, podcasts, PDFs, Notion, Obsidian, web) from any AI client. Per-user JWT auth, AI-agnostic.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token from your BrainTube API key (brain-tube.com -> Settings -> API Keys).
